trades.reasoning: Score 100 with all five bullish signals firing — RSI in sweet spot at 67.7, MACD crossover confirmed, histogram rising, price well above SMA-20, and volume surge confirming institutional interest in this AI networking chip leader.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher today in a neutral session — NASDAQ led at +0.5%, S&P at +0.3%, with no major macro catalyst forcing either direction. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, the rules strongly favor deployment, so I'm adding MRVL (AI networking chips, all signals green) and INTC (Intel recovery, strong technicals) to fill two slots and put idle cash to work. Existing holdings SYNA, QQQ, EAT, OLED, AMZN, and NSIT all remain — no stop-loss triggers are apparent.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains on May 20 as the tech-heavy NASDAQ outpaced the broader S&P 500, reflecting continued rotation into semiconductor and AI-related names amid stable macro conditions. No major Fed commentary or earnings surprises drove outsized moves, leaving the session characterized by steady institutional accumulation in momentum leaders. Volume surges across multiple chip stocks — MRVL, INTC, LSCC, CRDO — suggest fund managers are selectively adding exposure to AI infrastructure names ahead of an anticipated capex cycle.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月20日小幅走高，科技股主導的納斯達克跑贏大盤標普500指數，反映市場持續輪動至半導體及人工智能相關板塊，整體宏觀環境維持穩定。當日未有重大聯儲局表態或財報驚喜推動市場大幅波動，整個交易日呈現機構資金穩步吸納動能領漲股的格局。MRVL、INTC、LSCC及CRDO等多隻芯片股成交量急增，顯示基金經理在預期AI基礎設施資本支出周期升溫前，正選擇性增持相關倉位。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume is significantly higher than its recent average — typically 1.5x or more in one session. It signals that a large number of buyers (often institutions) are entering the position with conviction, which adds credibility to a price move upward. Without a volume surge, a price rally can be 'thin' and easily reversed; with one, it suggests real demand.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量急增是指某隻股票單日成交量遠高於近期平均水平——通常達1.5倍或以上。這意味著大批買家（往往是機構投資者）正積極入場建倉，為股價上漲提供了更強力的支撐。若股價上漲時缺乏成交量配合，升勢往往後勁不足、容易反轉；而伴隨成交量急增的突破，則代表真實的市場需求，走勢更具可信度。
